memoryArtifacts.headline: Overview of life
memoryArtifacts.description:
Childhood
Valdemar was the son of Canute Lavard, Duke of Schleswig, the chivalrous and popular eldest son of King Eric I of Denmark. Valdemar's father was murdered by King Magnus I of Sweden days befo …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen於1131年1月14日出生在丹麥斯萊斯維時，他的父親Knud Lavard36歲，母親Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark32歲。他於1150年之前與Tofa of Denmark在丹麥結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1157年在丹麥被列為konge af danmark。他去世於1182年5月12日在丹麥沃丁波格享年51歲，埋葬在丹麥林斯泰德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen于1131年1月14日出生在丹麦斯萊斯維时，他的父亲Knud Lavard36岁，母亲Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark32岁。他于1150年之前与Tofa of Denmark在丹麦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1157年在丹麦被列为konge af danmark。他去世于1182年5月12日在丹麦沃丁波格享年51岁，埋葬在丹麦林斯泰德。

nameMeanings.name: Knudsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Knud, Niels, Holger, Jorgen, Ove, Alf, Alfhild, Anders, Baard, Berger, Einer.
Danish, Norwegian, and North German: patronymic from the Danish personal name Knud, derived from Old Norse Knútr meaning ‘knot’. Knud was a Danish royal name, Latinized as Canutus.

variants.name: Knudsvig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Arlys, Helmer.
Norwegian: habitational name from a place in Rogaland named with the personal name Knut (see Knudsen ) + vig, Danish form of vik ‘bay, inlet’.

variants.name: Knuth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Arno, Claus, Erwin, Ewald, Frieda, Hans-Peter, Heinz, Jurgen, Klaus, Lorenz.
German: from the personal name Knut, Old Norse Knútr (see Knudsen ).
North German: variant of   Knoth  .

variants.name: Knudtson
meanings: Americanized form of Norwegian Knudtsen and of its much more common Danish or Norwegian variants Knudsen and Knutsen .

variants.name: Knutsen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Knute, Gunner, Aksel, Anders, Berent, Berger, Jarl, Knut, Lars, Nels, Nils.
Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name Knut, a cognate of Danish Knud (see Knudsen ).

variants.name: Knudson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Knute, Lars, Iver, Knud, Nels, Nils, Obert, Sigvald, Sven.
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Knudsen  .

variants.name: Knutson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Knute, Selmer, Ingard, Jarl, Jorgen, Juel, Nels, Obert, Tryg, Algot, Egil.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Knutsson: patronymic from the personal name Knut (see Knudsen ).
Americanized form of Norwegian   Knutsen  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Valdemar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Swedish derivative of Vladimir

variants.name: Waldemar
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + mar ‘fame’.

nameMeanings.name: 'den
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 鄧, see   Deng  .
Chinese: possibly from the Romanization of certain Chinese personal names of some early Chinese immigrants in the US.

Origin undetermined. — Note: It is possible that in the population figure published by the US Census Bureau the Dutch case-inflected definite article de ‘the’, which forms first part of surnames such as Den Bleyker and Den Boer , is in some instances counted as an independent surname. Compare Ten .

variants.name: Deng
meanings: ‘Roc’, a legendary bird. This is the given name of the Chinese premier Li Peng (  b. 1928 ).

nameMeanings.name: Store'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently a 20th-century coinage, although it may have been in use slightly earlier. The name is presumably derived from the vocabulary word, adopted by admirers of Sturm und Drang. It is used mainly for girls in Britain, but as a boy's name in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: When Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen was born on 14 January 1131, in Slesvig, Denmark, his father, Knud Lavard, was 36 and his mother, Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark, was 32. He married Tofa of Denmark before 1150, in Denmark. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1157, his occupation is listed as konge af danmark in Denmark. He died on 12 May 1182, in Vordingborg, Denmark, at the age of 51, and was buried in Ringsted, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen est né le 14 janvier 1131, à Slesvig, Danemark, son père, Knud Lavard, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Tofa of Denmark avant 1150, à Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1157, sa profession de son indiquée est konge af danmark à Danemark. Il est décédé le 12 mai 1182, à Vordingborg, Danemark, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Ringsted, Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Als Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen am 14. Januar 1131 in Schleswig, Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Knud Lavard 36 und seine Mutter Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark 32. Er hat vor 1150 in Dänemark Tofa of Denmark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1157 ist sein Beruf als konge af danmark in Dänemark aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. Mai 1182 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Vordingborg, Dänemark und wurde in Ringsted, Dänemark begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen è nato il il 14 gennaio 1131 nel Slesvig, Danimarca, il suo padre, Knud Lavard, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Tofa of Denmark prima del 1150, nel Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1157, la sua occupazione è indicata come konge af danmark nel Danimarca. Morì il 12 maggio 1182, nel Vordingborg, Danimarca, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Ringsted, Danimarca.

ja.lifeSummary: Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsenが1131年1月14日にデンマークスレスヴィグで生まれた時，父Knud Lavardは36歳，母Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmarkは32歳であった。1150年以前にデンマークでTofa of Denmarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1157年，デンマークでの職業はkonge af danmarkと記録されている。彼は1182年5月12日にデンマークボルディングボルグで51歳で死去し，デンマークリングステドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen(이)가 1131년 1월 14일 덴마크 슬레스비그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Knud Lavard(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1150년 이전 덴마크에서 Tofa of Denmark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1157년, 그의 직업은 덴마크에서 konge af danmark이었다. 그는 1182년 5월 12일 덴마크 보르딩볼그에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴마크 링스테드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen nasceu em 14 de janeiro de 1131, em Slesvig, Dinamarca, seu pai, Knud Lavard, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Tofa of Denmark antes 1150, em Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1157, sua profissão aparece como konge af danmark em Dinamarca. Ele faleceu em 12 de maio de 1182, em Vordingborg, Dinamarca, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Ringsted, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen родился 14 января 1131 г. в местности слесвиг, Дания, его отцу по имени Knud Lavard было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Tofa of Denmark перед 1150 г. в местности Дания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1157 году он работал по профессии konge af danmark в местности Дания. Он умер 12 мая 1182 г. в местности фордингборг, Дания в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности рингстед, Дания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen nació el 14 de enero de 1131, en Slesvig, Dinamarca, su papá, Knud Lavard, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Tofa of Denmark antes de 1150, en Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1157, su ocupación registrada era konge af danmark en Dinamarca. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1182, en Vordingborg, Dinamarca, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Ringsted, Dinamarca.
